title: Europe’s competitiveness starts with the courage to listen to the next generation [Promoted Content]
summary_full: As the current EU political cycle unfolds, competitiveness has become the dominant frame shaping European policymaking. It is increasingly discussed in terms of productivity, investment capacity, and Europe’s position in an intensifying global competition.  For younger generations, however, competitiveness also has a human dimension: Europe’s ability to offer real opportunities, wellbeing, and fairness while staying […]
